title: The Taris Holofeed: Invasion Edition
content:
{{Top|rwm|old}}
'''The Taris Holofeed: Invasion Edition''' was the issue of the ''[[Taris Holofeed]]'' released with [[Knights of the Old Republic 18|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 18]].
